room.caption: [4] They say you can attempt to cheat here, but you'll be stopped.

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=816 newMapY=464 toRoom=rMain_3 colorChange=1
sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=56 newMapY=896 toRoom=rMain_5 colorChange=1
sprite_index=sPitfallSign stringToShow="Pitfalls lead to death." signSize=1
sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=1568 newMapY=288 toRoom=rMain_60 colorChange=1
stringToShow="If you can't jump yet, here's a bottomless pit for you.#You're welcome. <3" signSize=2
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=4 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=0 yDir=4 shiftChange=88 spriteChange=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=0 yDir=4 shiftChange=60 spriteChange=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=0 yDir=2 shiftChange=48 spriteChange=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=2 yDir=0 shiftChange=40 spriteChange=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=0 yDir=-4 shiftChange=32 spriteChange=1

image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_HeartPiece stringToShow="You can now jump!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=0
if global.gameProgress>=70 instance_destroy()
